title: Dexcost Event v1
description: Standard Event Schema v1 — Event payload. Represents a single cost-generating event within a task.

task_id.description: UUID of the parent task this event belongs to.

occurred_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the event occurred.

cost_usd.description: Cost of this event in USD (Decimal as string).

cost_confidence.description: How trustworthy the reported cost_usd value is.

pricing_source.description: Where the cost_usd figure was derived from (litellm, tokencost, provider_response, manual).

pricing_version.description: Version of the pricing data used.

service_name.description: Name of the service that generated this cost event.

provider.description: LLM provider name (e.g. openai, anthropic). Null for non-LLM events.

model.description: LLM model identifier (e.g. gpt-4o). Null for non-LLM events.

input_tokens.description: Input token count. Null for non-LLM events.

output_tokens.description: Output token count. Null for non-LLM events.

cached_tokens.description: Cached token count. Null for non-LLM events.

latency_ms.description: Latency in milliseconds. Null for non-LLM events.

is_retry.description: Whether this event is a retry of a previous event.

retry_reason.description: Reason for the retry (rate_limit, timeout, parse_error, 5xx).

retry_of.description: UUID of the original event this is a retry of.

schema_version.description: Schema version — always '1' for v1 payloads.
